headline: Boeing and Copa Airlines Announce Order for up to 60 737 MAX Jets
summary: Boeing [NYSE: BA] and Copa Airlines today announced the Panamanian operator has ordered 40 737 MAX airplanes. Under the agreement, Copa Airlines also has options to acquire up to 20 more of the single-aisle airplane family.

raw.headline: Boeing and Copa Airlines Announce Order for up to 60 737 MAX Jets

headline: Panama's Copa Airlines orders 60 more Boeing 737 MAX for $13.5 bn
summary: Panama's flagship carrier Copa Airlines signed a $13.5 billion deal Tuesday to purchase 60 Boeing 737 MAX planes, adding to 40 others already on order.The first stage of the expansion aimed to build space for the 40 Boeing 737s Copa already bought that "are being delivered."

raw.headline: Panama's Copa Airlines orders 60 more Boeing 737 MAX for $13.5 bn

headline: Airbus profits slide as deliveries drop
summary: Airbus said Tuesday its first-quarter profit fell as it delivered fewer planes to customers, falling behind rival Boeing for the first time in years.It also kept its 2026 target of 870 aircraft, which would beat its record year in 2019 of delivering 863 planes to customers.

summary: The European planemaker handed over 114 commercial aircraft in the quarter, down from 136 a year earlier, as a rival Boeing rebounds

headline: How JOBY Stock Rises 8x To $70
summary: Joby Aviation’s (JOBY) most critical metric is the "certification timeline" that CEO JoeBen Bevirt uses to anchor investor expectations. While it is often obscured by quarterly cash burn figures, this timeline is the primary driver of Joby’s valuation. This analysis focuses on that specific metric.

headline: BAE Systems in production for NavGuide™ GPS receiver
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has entered production and begun initial deliveries of its NavGuide™ GPS receiver. This portable, field-installable M-Code GPS receiver provides secure positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) for vehicle, handheld, and sensor applications.

raw.headline: BAE Systems in production for NavGuide™ GPS receiver

headline: Airbus reports falling profts as jet deliveries slow
summary: Airbus' first-quarter adjusted operating profit declined by 52% to 300 million euros, down from 624 million euros in the same period last year.

headline: Boeing’s MQ-25A Milestone Highlights Growing Role Of Unmanned Defense Programs
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) and the U.S. Navy completed the first operational test flight of the MQ-25A Stingray unmanned aerial refueler. The test was conducted as part of carrier air wing operations, marking a key milestone for autonomous naval aviation. The MQ-25A is designed to provide aerial refueling support from aircraft carriers using an unmanned platform. For you as an investor, this MQ-25A milestone sits within Boeing’s broader defense and autonomous systems work, alongside its commercial...
